gist.headline: Harvesting data by the day
gist.blurb: We've swapped out the old rolling usage buttons for a shiny new calendar picker. Now you can slice and dice your API usage stats by exact days, weeks, or months!
gist.summary: Replaced rolling usage range buttons with a precise Day/Week/Month calendar period picker, including backend support for exact time windows.
gist.impact: Users can now filter their API usage data and export CSVs for specific time periods instead of relying on fixed rolling windows.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a glowing calendar and usage charts. The robot's screen shows a bar chart, and Polly is holding a tiny pointer to represent selecting a specific time period.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pointing at a glowing retro calendar next to a chunky monitor robot whose screen displays a colorful bar chart. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
